layers.name: spec ↔ product-spec
layers.description: All FRs, NFRs, Decisions, and SCs in spec.md are mirrored in product-spec artifacts.
evidence: FR-040 → product-spec.md Core principle #1 (free tier) and US-010-001
FR-041 → product-spec.md Core principle #2 (premium tier), US-010-002, pricing table ($6.99/mo, $59.99/yr)
FR-042 → product-spec.md Core principle #3 (upgrade prompts), US-010-003, paywall hierarchy
FR-043 → product-spec.md Core principle #4 (data retention), US-010-004, D-3 7-day grace
NFR-001..NFR-004 → Referenced implicitly in wireframe a11y notes and TypeScript strict compliance in codebase-analysis.md
D-1..D-8 → Closed Decisions table in product-spec.md and full rationale in review.md Revision 1
SC-005, SC-006 → product-spec/metrics.md MET-010-001..MET-010-003 and conversion KPIs

layers.name: spec Must-Have ↔ plan
layers.description: All Must-Have FRs (FR-040..FR-043) and closed decisions are addressed by plan.md architecture.
evidence: FR-040 → plan.md §2 Account Entity Additions (default free), §4 Feature Gating Map (no gating on free endpoints), §7 Subscription States
FR-041 → plan.md §3 API Contracts (checkout/portal), §4 Feature Gating Map (gated endpoints), §5 Stripe Billing Stack, pricing ($6.99/mo, $59.99/yr), trial_period_days: 14
FR-042 → plan.md §8 Upgrade Prompts (three-tier hierarchy), TASK-022 web components, TASK-024 mobile components
FR-043 → plan.md §2 Data Model (retain on lapse), §7 Subscription States (canceled→free), TASK-026 data retention, TASK-027 read-only, D-3 7-day grace
OQ-1..OQ-5 → plan.md §6 Open Questions table (all answered)

layers.name: plan ↔ tasks
layers.description: 28 tasks cover all plan sections with minor naming drift.
evidence: TASK-001 covers plan.md §5 Stripe Billing Stack (StripeModule config)
TASK-002, TASK-003 cover plan.md §2 Data Model (Account columns + webhook_events table)
TASK-004..TASK-007 cover plan.md §4 Feature Gating Map (decorator, guard, unit tests)
TASK-008..TASK-013 cover plan.md §3 API Contracts (Billing endpoints)
TASK-014..TASK-020 cover plan.md §3 API Contracts (Webhook endpoint) and §5 Webhook handling
TASK-021..TASK-024 cover plan.md §8 Upgrade Prompts (interceptor, web/mobile UI)
TASK-025 covers plan.md §9 Testing (E2E upgrade flow)
TASK-026, TASK-027 cover plan.md §2 Data Model / FR-043 (retention + read-only)
TASK-028 covers plan.md §8 Mobile parity (status + deep-link)

findings.description: Task naming drift: TASK-020 is labeled 'Integration tests for webhook handlers' but plan.md does not explicitly map a dedicated integration-test module for webhooks; closest is §9 Testing 'E2E upgrade flow'.
findings.action: Reconcile during implementation whether TASK-020 executes as integration tests or E2E tests.

layers.name: spec ↔ V-Model
layers.description: V-Model requirements REQ-001..REQ-031 map bidirectionally to FR-040..FR-043 and closed decisions.
evidence: FR-040 ↔ REQ-001..REQ-007 (free tier entitlements and default assignment)
FR-041 ↔ REQ-008..REQ-018 (premium features), REQ-026 (pricing), REQ-027 (14-day trial)
FR-042 ↔ REQ-029 (three-tier prompt hierarchy), REQ-030 (clear CTA), REQ-031 (respectful non-intrusive)
FR-043 ↔ REQ-019..REQ-025 (data retention, lapse behavior), REQ-028 (7-day grace)
NFR-001..NFR-004 ↔ Referenced across V-Model peer-review files and system-design accessibility notes
Traceability Matrix (traceability-matrix.md) covers REQ-001..REQ-031 mapped to AC-001..AC-027

layers.name: cross-feature deps
